input.background: There are n workers in an assembly line factory and it is known that the number of workers independently reporting for work on a given day is binomially distributed with parameters n and p where p is the probability of an individual who presents for work.
input.question: Determine this probability when p = 0.95 and n = 20.

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 2: Distribution Functions and Its Applications
